title: Odin Local Config
description: Safe local configuration schema for Odin Local Runtime Hub. Settings visibility only. Not a security certification. Not a production readiness certification.

localhost_only.description: Must be true. Odin local config is localhost-only by default.

bind_host.description: Allowed bind hosts: 127.0.0.1 or localhost only.

public_network_enabled.description: Must be false. Public network is not Odin authority.

external_send_enabled.description: Must be false. External send is not Odin authority.

app_apply_enabled.description: Must be false. App apply is host-owned, not Odin authority.

provider_credentials_enabled.description: Must be false. Provider credentials must not be enabled by default.

raw_payload_reveal_enabled.description: Must be false. Raw payload reveal is not allowed in safe config.

redaction_enabled.description: Must be true. Redaction must remain enabled.

log_secrets.description: Must be false if present. Secrets must not appear in logs.

enabled_by_default.description: Must be false. Providers are disabled by default. Explicit config required.

providers.description: Provider settings. All providers disabled by default.

candidate_only.description: Must be true. This config is a candidate artifact.

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary identifier for this config artifact.
